_comment: NNC Feature Flags - Toggle NNC features without deployment
_nnc_enabled_desc: Master switch for all NNC features
_use_nnc_returns_desc: Use geometric mean for return calculations instead of arithmetic
_use_nnc_risk_desc: Use multiplicative risk compounding instead of additive
_use_nnc_nav_desc: Track NAV using multiplicative growth factors
_use_prelec_weighting_desc: Apply Prelec probability weighting to P(ruin)
_use_k_evolution_desc: Use gate-dependent k parameter from k(L) formula
_use_star_euler_projection_desc: Use Star-Euler projection for gate timing
_parallel_classical_nnc_desc: Run both classical and NNC calculations, alert on divergence
_divergence_alert_threshold_desc: Alert when classical vs NNC diverge by more than 10%
_use_globalmoo_desc: Use GlobalMOO cloud API (requires API key)
_use_woven_moo_desc: Use GlobalMOO + Pymoo woven strategy (best when available)
_pareto_strategy_labeling_desc: Use Pareto-optimal sets for TRM training labels
_nnc_profit_weighted_loss_desc: Use asymmetric NNC profit weighting in TRM loss
_scheme_robust_signals_desc: Require 60% model consensus for strategy signals
_default_strategy_on_disagreement_desc: Strategy to use when consensus not reached (strategy index 2)
